title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Dove India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Dove India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Category Manager with drive and ambition, Dove India in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Dove India:
Dove India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dove India!
